goals: Search for information about the history of McLeansboro, Illinois
Search for baseball history and local teams in the McLeansboro area or Southern Illinois
Find information about notable historical figures or events from Hamilton County, Illinois

user_agent_config.personality: Passionate about preserving and learning about local history, particularly interested in baseball's connection to their community. Asks detailed follow-up questions to dig deeper into topics.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Does not know technical details about SearXNG or search tools; communicates in natural language and expects helpful, readable results.

end_condition: User has gathered information about McLeansboro history, local baseball, and Hamilton County historical figures, and expresses satisfaction or indicates they have enough information to explore further on their own.
